callSettings.title: Dejinta Wicitaannada
callSettings.description: Habee sida safka wicitaannada iyo dejinta fariinta codeedka.

callSettings.voicemailMaxDescription: Ugu dheeraan muddo duubasho ee fariimaha codeedka (ilbiriqsiyo).

callSettings.voicemailModeAlways: Mar walba — wicitaan kasta waxay aadaa fariinta codeedka
callSettings.voicemailModeNever: Weligeed — dejiso haddii cid diyaar ahi jirin
callSettings.retentionDaysDescription: Si otomaatig ah u tirtir fariimaha codeedka maalmahaan kadib. Banaan u dhaaf hayn aan xad lahayn.

transcription.title: Qoraal u Rogid
transcription.generating: Waa la sameynayaa qoraal u rogid...
transcription.disabled: Qoraal u rogidda waa la damiyay
transcription.enabledGlobal: Qoraal u rogidda waa la shidday (maamulka)
transcription.disabledGlobal: Qoraal u rogidda waa maamulku damiyay
transcription.enableForCalls: U shid qoraal u rogidda wicitaannadayda
transcription.disableForCalls: U dami qoraal u rogidda wicitaannadayda
transcription.allowOptOut: U oggolow mutadawwiciinta inay damiyaan qoraal u rogidda
transcription.allowOptOutDescription: Marka la damiyo, mutadawwiciintu kama bixi karaan qoraal u rogidda wicitaannada
transcription.managedByAdmin: Qoraal u rogidda waxaa maamula maamulkaaga
transcription.clientSideDescription: Ku qoraal u rog wicitaannada gudaha biraawsarkaaga. Codku weligiis ka baxmaayo qalabkaaga.
transcription.enableClientSide: Shid qoraal u rogidda gudaha biraawsarka
transcription.modelTinyEn: Yar (Ingiriis) — ugu dhakhsaha badan, ~40MB soo dejin
transcription.modelBaseEn: Saldhig (Ingiriis) — sax dhamayn wanaagsan, ~75MB soo dejin
transcription.modelBase: Saldhig (Luqado badan) — sax dhamayn wanaagsan, ~75MB soo dejin
transcription.localMicOnly: Keliya hadalkaaga ayaa la qoraal u rogayaa
transcription.localMicOnlyDescription: Keliya codka maykrafoonkaaga ayaa la qabsadaa. Codka wacaha looma heli karo qoraal u rogid.
transcription.notSupported: Biraawsarkaagu kuma taageerayo qoraal u rogidda gudaha biraawsarka
transcription.loading: Waa la soo rarayaa naqshada qoraal u rogidda...
transcription.capturing: Waa la qoraal u rogayaa hadalkaa...
transcription.finalizing: Waa la dhammaynayaa qoraal u rogidda...
transcription.saved: Qoraal u rogidda waa la keydiyay

shifts.title: Jadwalka Wareegyada

webauthn.policyDescription: U qasab furayaasha amniga kooxaha isticmaalaha. Kuwa aan furayaal lahayn waxaa laga codsan doonaa inay dejiyaan mid.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Waxaa lagu martiqaaday inaad ka qayb gasho mutadawwic ahaan, {{volunteerName}}

onboarding.recoveryKeyWarning: Qor oo meel amaan ah kaydi. Haddii aad lumisid PIN-kaaga iyo furahan, xisaabtaada lama soo celin karo.

onboarding.storageTip2: Ku kaydi qalabka gaarka ah ee aad adiga keliya isticmaashid

confirm.transcriptionEnable: U shid qoraal u rogidda wicitaannada dhammaan mutadawwiciinta? Tani waxay isticmaashaa AI si ay u qoraal u rogto wicitaannada wakhtiga dhabta ah.
confirm.transcriptionDisable: Dami qoraal u rogidda wicitaannada? Isticmaalayaashu mar dambe uma qoraal u rogmi doonaan wicitaannooda si otomaatig ah.
confirm.captchaEnable: Ma shidi CAPTCHA codeedka? Wacayaasha waxaa laga codsan doonaa inay geliyaan lambar random ah ka hor inta aan la isku xirin.
confirm.captchaDisable: Ma dami CAPTCHA codeedka? Wacayaasha si toos ah ayaa loo isku xiri doonaa xaqiijin la'aan.
confirm.rateLimitEnable: Ma shidi xadaynta tirada? Wicitaannada soo noqnoqda ee lambar isku mid ah waa la xannibi doonaa si ku meel gaar ah.
confirm.rateLimitDisable: Ma dami xadaynta tirada? Wax xadayn ah ma jiri doonto wicitaannada soo noqnoqda ee lambar isku mid ah.

telephonyProvider.title: Bixiyaha Taleefanka
telephonyProvider.description: Habee bixiyaha taleefanka ee loo isticmaalo maamulidda wicitaannada
telephonyProvider.envFallback: Waxaa la isticmaalayaa dejinta asalka ee deegaanka (Twilio)
telephonyProvider.bridgeCallbackUrlHelp: URL-ka ARI bridge-ku webhooks ugu diro abkan
telephonyProvider.testFailed: Isku xirku waa ku guul dareeystay

providerDescriptions.twilio: Taleefan daruureed oo heerka warshadaha ah. Ugu sahlan in la habeeyo oo leh dukumiinti fiican.
providerDescriptions.signalwire: API Twilio la jaan qaadi karo oo qiimo jaban. Ku beddeli karo inta badan kiisaska.
providerDescriptions.vonage: Bixiye taleefan caalami ah oo leh garaac wanaagsan oo caalami ah iyo qiimo tartan leh.
providerDescriptions.plivo: Taleefan daruureed oo qiimo jaban oo leh API nadiif ah. Wanaagsan dejinta miisaaniyadda ah.
providerDescriptions.asterisk: PBX-ka aad adigu martigeliso si aad u hesho maamul buuxa iyo qiimo ugu hooseysa daqiiqadiiba. Wuxuu u baahan yahay in la habeeyo server-ka.

telephonyProvider.notImplemented: Bixiyahaan wali lama hirgelin. Fadlan isticmaal Twilio ama SignalWire.
telephonyProvider.webrtcConfigHelp: Shid wicitaanka biraawsarka ee mutadawwiciinta. Wuxuu u baahan yahay aqoonsiyaal dheeraad ah.
telephonyProvider.apiKeySidHelp: Ka samee API Key console-kaaga Twilio/SignalWire
telephonyProvider.twimlAppSidHelp: Samee TwiML App oo leh voice URL u tilmaama webhook-kaaga

customFields.title: Goobaha Gaarka ah ee Qoraallada
customFields.description: Qeex goobaha dheeraadka ah ee ku muuqda foomka qoraallada
customFields.maxFields: Ugu badnaan 20 goob ayaa la gaadhay
customFields.deleteConfirm: Ma tirtirisaa goobtan? Qoraallada horey u jiray ee goobtan leh xogdoodu way sii jiri doontaa.
customFields.locationEncryptionNote: Xogta goobtu waxay la sirnaan doontaa waxa qoraallada ku jira (aqoon-la'aan)

visibleToOptions.full: Xubnaha leh marin PII oo dhan oo keliya

setup.title: Hagaha Habeynta
setup.pinRequired: Geli PIN-kaaga si aad u sii waddo habeynta.
setup.saveFailed: Waa lagu guul dareeystay kaydinta horumarka
setup.complete: Habeynta waa la dhammeeyay! Ku soo dhawoow khadkaaga taleefanka.
setup.completeFailed: Waa lagu guul dareeystay dhammaynta habeynta
setup.identityDescription: Dooro magac iyo luqad khadka taleefankaaga xiisadda.
setup.hotlineNameHelp: Tan waxaa loo muujiyaa mutadawwiciinta abka. Amniga awgiis, PWA-du waxay isticmaashaa magac guud.
setup.primaryLanguageHelp: Luqadda asal ee bogga maamulka iyo codadka IVR.
setup.channelsDescription: Dooro kanaalada khadka taleefankaagu isticmaali doono. Waxaad dambe shidi kartaa kuwo kale.
setup.channelVoiceDesc: Wicitaannada caadiga ah ee loo kala duwayo mutadawwiciinta wareegga ku jira iyo garaacis wada socda.
setup.channelSmsDesc: Wadahadallada fariinta qoraalka ee wacayaasha adoo isticmaalaya lambarka khadka taleefankaaga.
setup.channelWhatsappDesc: Fariimaha WhatsApp ee wacayaasha doorta inay isticmaalaan taleefan ama SMS.
setup.channelSignalDesc: Fariimaha Signal ee kalsoonida ugu badan ee wacaha adoo isticmaalaya bridge-ka aad martigeliso.
setup.channelReportsDesc: Warbixinno sirnaan leh oo toos looga gudbiyo abka shabakadda. Dhismaha ku jira, bixiye looma baahna.
setup.channelVoiceReq: Wuxuu u baahan yahay bixiye taleefan
setup.channelSmsReq: Wuxuu u baahan yahay bixiye taleefan
setup.channelWhatsappReq: Wuxuu u baahan yahay WhatsApp Business API
setup.channelSignalReq: Wuxuu u baahan yahay server-ka bridge-ka Signal
setup.selectOneChannel: Fadlan dooro ugu yaraan hal kanaal
setup.providersDescription: Habee adeegyada u shaqeeya kanaaladaada la doortay.
setup.noProvidersNeeded: Bixiyayaal dibadda ah looma baahna kanaaladaada la doortay. Waxaad u gudbi kartaa tallaabada xigta.
setup.signalDescription: Ku xidhiidhi bridge-ka Signal ee aad martigeliso fariimaha sirnaan dhinac-ka-dhinac.
setup.whatsappTwilioNote: Fariimaha WhatsApp waxaa laga maamuli doonaa bixiyuhu taleefankaaga ee Twilio ee jira. Habeyn dheeraad ah looma baahna.
setup.webhookCopied: URL-ka Webhook-ka waa loo koobiyeeyay sanduuqa wax la dhejiyay
setup.settingsDescription: Habee dejinta aasaasiga ah ee kanaaladaada la doortay. Dambe waa la hagaajin karaa.
setup.noSettingsNeeded: Dejin dheeraad ah looma baahna kanaaladaada la doortay.
setup.queueTimeoutHelp: Inta wacaha sugayo ka hor inta uusan u bixin fariinta codeedka.
setup.voicemailEnabledHelp: U oggolow wacayaasha inay ka tagaan fariin codeed haddii cid jawaabin.
setup.autoResponseHelp: Si otomaatig ah ayaa loo diraa marka wadahadal cusub bilaabmo.
setup.autoResponsePlaceholder: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad nala soo xiriirtay. Mutadawwic ayaa kugu soo biiri doona.
setup.maxConcurrent: Ugu Badnaan Isku Mar ee Mutadawwic Kasta
setup.reportCategoriesHelp: Qeex noocyada warbixinnada soo socda (tusaale Dhibaato, Hanjabaad, Kuwo kale).
setup.inviteDescription: Samee koodyo martiqaad ah kooxdaada. Kood kasta waa hal mar oo wuxuu dhammaadaa 7 maalmood.
setup.inviteCreated: Martiqaaddii si guul leh ayaa loo sameeyay
setup.inviteCopied: Isku xirka martiqaadda waa loo koobiyeeyay sanduuqa wax la dhejiyay
setup.summaryDescription: Dib u eeg habeynta khadka taleefankaaga ka hor inta aadan bilaabin.

bootstrap.title: Samee Xisaabta Maamulka
bootstrap.welcomeDescription: Aan sameeyno xisaabtaada maamulka. Aqoonsiintaada sirta ah waxaa lagu sameeyay biraawsarkaaga — server-ku weligiis arkimaayo furuhaaga gaarka ah.
bootstrap.noAdminMessage: Xisaab maamul ah wali lama habeynin. Dhamee hagaha habeynta si aad u bilowdid.

setup.demoModeDescription: Waxay sameysaa xisaabyo mutadawwiciin tusaale ah, wareegyo, iyo liiska mamnuucida tijaabo iyo muujin. Xisaabaha tijaabada aqoonsigoodii waxaa lagu muujin doonaa bogga gelitaanka.
setup.demoSeedFailed: Xogta tusaalaha ayaa si qayb ah loo sameeyay

signal.e2eeNote: Signal wuxuu bixiyaa sirnaan dhinac-ka-dhinac ilaa bridge-ka. Fariimaha waxaa mar kale loo sirayaa furayaasha khadkaaga taleefanka ka hor inta aan la kaydin.

security.transportLabel: Gaadiidka: Signal (E2EE ilaa bridge-ka, kan ugu adag ee diyaarka ah)
security.bridgeDecryptionNotice: Signal wuxuu bixiyaa sirnaan gaadiid oo xoog leh. Fariimaha waxaa lagu furayaa bridge-ka server-ka ee aan adigu martigelino (kaabayaashaada gudahooda) habayn darteed, kadib mar kale waa la sirayaa kaydinta. Bridge-ku wuxuu u baahan yahay dayactir sii socda marka Signal cusbooneysiyo borotokolkiisa.

signalRegistration.title: Diiwaangelinta Lambarka Signal
signalRegistration.description: Ku diiwaangeli lambarka taleefanka khadkaaga Signal. Koodka xaqiijinta waa lagu qabanayaa si otomaatig ah SMS-ka soo galaya.
signalRegistration.notConfigured: Lambarka Signal wali lama diiwaangeliyin. Diiwaangeli si aad u shiddo fariimaha Signal.
signalRegistration.waitingSmsDescription: Koodka xaqiijinta waa lagu qabanayaa si otomaatig ah SMS-ka soo galaya. Tani waxay qaadan kartaa daqiiqo dhowr ah.
signalRegistration.voiceDescription: Geli koodka 6 lambar ee wicitaanka codeedka xaqiijinta.
signalRegistration.alreadyInProgress: Diiwaangelintu horey ayay u socotaa — sug inay dhammaato ama cusbooneysii bogga.
signalRegistration.expired: Diiwaangelintu waa dhammaatay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

deviceLink.title: Ku Xidhiidhi Qalabka
deviceLink.description: Habee qalabkan adoo ku xidhiidhiya xisaabtaada jirta.
deviceLink.instructions: Qalabkaaga aasaasiga, aad Dejinta oo fur qaybta 'Qalabka La Xidhiidhiyay'. Kadib sawir koodka QR ama geli koodka halkan la muujiyay.
deviceLink.scanFromPrimary: Ka sawir koodkan Dejinta qalabkaaga aasaasiga.
deviceLink.linkSuccess: Qalabka si guul leh ayaa loo xidhiidhiyay!
deviceLink.linkSuccessDesc: Xisaabtaada hadda waxaa laga heli karaa qalabkan. Samee PIN si aad u ilaaliso.
deviceLink.linkFailed: Isku xidhiidhinta qalabku waa ku guul dareeystay
deviceLink.linkExpired: Kulanka isku xidhiidhinta waa dhammaatay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
deviceLink.linkedDevicesDesc: Ku xidhiidhi qalabka cusub xisaabtaada adoo geliya koodka habeynta.
deviceLink.linkFromPrimary: Si aad u xidhiidhiso qalabka cusub, qalabka cusub ku fur abka Hotline, taabo 'Ku xidhiidhi qalabkan', kadib geli koodka la muujiyay.
deviceLink.codePlaceholder: Ku dheji xogta QR ama koodka...
deviceLink.invalidCode: Koodka habeyntu waa khalad. Fadlan sawir koodka QR ama koobiyee koodka oo dhan.
deviceLink.verifySASDesc: Barbar dhig koodkan koodka lagu muujiyay qalabkaaga aasaasiga.
deviceLink.verifySASPrimary: Xaqiiji in koodkan la mid yahay koodka qalabka cusub:
deviceLink.compareCodes: Labada qalabba waa inay muujiyaan isku kood. Haddii koodyadani aan iswaafaqin, HA sii wadin — weerare ayaa jiri kara.
deviceLink.sasMismatch: Koodyadii amniga isuma waafaqsanayn. Kulankii isku xidhiidhinta waa la joojiyay amnigaaga dartii. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
deviceLink.decryptFailed: Waa lagu guul dareeystay furitaanka furaha qalabka aasaasiga. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
deviceLink.cameraPermission: Ogolaanshaha kaamarada ayaa loo baahan yahay si loo sawiro koodyadda QR
deviceLink.verifySubtitle: Xaqiiji in koodku isku mid yahay labada qalabba

hubs.title: Maamulidda Xarumaha
hubs.createHubDescription: Samee xarun cusub si aad u habeyso howlaha khadkaaga taleefanka.
hubs.editHubDescription: Cusbooneysii magaca, sharaxaadda, ama lambarka xarunta.
hubs.hubPhoneNumberHelp: Lambarka taleefanka aasaasiga ee xaruntaan (qaabka E.164).
hubs.hubCreated: Xarunta si guul leh ayaa loo sameeyay
hubs.hubUpdated: Xarunta si guul leh ayaa loo cusbooneysiiyay
hubs.noHubs: Xarumo ma jiraan wali. Samee xarun si aad u bilowdid habeynta khadkaaga taleefanka.
hubs.archiveHubConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad kaydisid "{{name}}"? Xaruntaan waxaa laga qarin doonaa liiska firfircoonka.
hubs.hubArchived: Xarunta si guul leh ayaa loo kaydiyay
hubs.deleteHubConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad tirtirisid "{{name}}" oo joogto ah? Tallaabodan dib looma ceshan karo.
hubs.deleteHubNameLabel: Ku qor magaca xarunta si aad u xaqiijiso
hubs.deleteHubActiveCallsError: Lama tirtiri karo xarun leh wicitaanno socda
hubs.hubDeleted: Xarunta si guul leh ayaa loo tirtiray

accessControl.title: Marin Maamulaha Platform-ka
accessControl.allowSuperAdmin: U oggolow maamulaha platform-ka inuu arko xogta xaruntaan
accessControl.description: Marka la damiyo, maamulaha platform-ku ma furi karo qoraallada wicitaannada, wadahadalada, ama warbixinnada. Tani waxaa lagu dhaqan geliyay sirnaan — ma aha hubinta ogolaanshaha.
accessControl.enableConfirm: Tani waxay siisaa maamulaha platform-ka marin diiwaannada cusub ee xaruntaan. Diiwaannada taariikhiga ah marin ma heleyso. Ma sii wadaa?
accessControl.disableConfirm: Tani waxay ka qaadaysaa maamulaha platform-ka marintiisa xaruntaan. Diiwaannada mustaqbalka marin bay u wayday isla markiiba. Ma sii wadaa?

export.title: Dhoofi Xogta Xarunta
export.description: Soo dejiso koobi xogtaada xarunta ah ka hor inta aad tirtirto. Dhammaan waxa la dhoofiyay waa qoraal-sir E2EE ah.

blasts.title: Fariimaha Guud
blasts.noBlasts: Fariimo guud ma jiraan wali. Samee mid si aad u bilowdid.
blasts.selectOrCreate: Dooro fariin guud ama cusub samee
blasts.importResult: Waa la soo dejiyay {{imported}}, waa la ka boodday {{skipped}}
blasts.stopRequired: STOP waa la garwaaqi doonaa mar walba (waafaqidda TCPA)
blasts.doubleOptInDesc: Ka dalbo isdiiwaangeliyayaasha inay xaqiijiyaan ka hor inta aanay helin fariimaha guud
blasts.loading: Waa la soo rarayaa fariimaha guud...

preferences.title: Doorashada Fariimaha
preferences.invalidToken: Isku xirka doorashada waa khalad ama waa dhammaatay

geocoding.title: Geocoding / Goobta
geocoding.description: Habee bixiyaha geocoding si aad u shiddo buuxinta otomaatigga goobta goobaha gaarka ah
geocoding.countriesHelp: Koodyadda dalka oo 2 xaraf ah oo kala kood lagu kala saaro. Banaan u dhaaf adduun oo dhan.
geocoding.testFailed: Tijaabinta isku xirku waa ku guul dareeystay

blast.optOutFooter: Ku jawaab STOP si aad uga baxdo

contacts.title: Xiriiriyayaal
contacts.piiEncrypted: Waa la siray — wuxuu u baahan yahay marin la ogol yahay
contacts.duplicateWarning: Xiriiriye lambarkaan taleefanka leh ayaa jiri kara
contacts.notifyDescription: U dir fariin {{name}} iyada oo loo marayo {{channel}}
contacts.reportCreated: Warbixinta si guul leh ayaa loo sameeyay

users.title: Isticmaalayaal
users.name: Magac
users.inviteGenerated: Martiqaaddii waa la sameeyay! Furaha sirta ah si amaan ah u la wadaag.
users.secretKeyWarning: Furahaan hal mar oo keliya ayaa la muujin doonaa. Si amaan ah ula wadaag mutadawwiciga.
users.invalidPhone: Lambarka taleefanku waa khalad. Isticmaal qaabka E.164 (tusaale +12125551234)
users.deleteConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad ka saaraysid mutadawwicigaan?
users.smsInsecureWarning: SMS ma aha sirnaan. Isku xirka martiqaadda waxay u muuqan doontaa shirkadda taleefanka iyo qaar kale.
users.smsAcknowledge: Waan garanayaa SMS ma aha amaan
users.smsAcknowledgeRequired: Waa inaad garwaaqsataa khatarta amniga ka hor inta aadan ku dirin SMS
users.noChannelsConfigured: Kanaal fariimo ah lama habeynin. Isticmaal Koobiyee Isku xirka si aad ula wadaagto martiqaadda.
users.inviteSentSuccess: Martiqaaddii si guul leh ayaa loo diray
users.userAdded: Isticmaalaha si guul leh ayaa loo daray

userProfile.messagingEnabledDescription: U oggolow mutadawwicigan inuu maamulo wadahadalada fariimaha
